stemHtml: A flight crew are about to depart on an unusually hot day, which requires them to use a low flap setting to attain the minimum climb gradients. If a higher flap setting is inadvertently chosen for takeoff, the rotation speed will be (1) _____ and their climb performance will be (2) _____.

options.a: (1) slower, (2) higher than the minimum requirement
options.b: (1) slower, (2) lower than the minimum requirement
options.c: (1) higher, (2) lower than the minimum requirement
options.d: (1) higher, (2) higher than the minimum requirement
